qa_pairs.question: Why is it not recommended to run TensorBoard on a login node?
qa_pairs.answer: TensorBoard requires too much processing power to be run on a login node.

qa_pairs.question: Where are users encouraged to execute TensorBoard?
qa_pairs.answer: Users are strongly encouraged to execute TensorBoard in the same job as the TensorFlow process.

qa_pairs.question: How do you launch TensorBoard in the background when running it in the same job as a TensorFlow process?
qa_pairs.answer: To launch TensorBoard in the background, you call it before your Python script and append an ampersand (&) to the call.
